prompt_text:
### Demographics: 64-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 13 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Cataract (status post surgery)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (5 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~2.5 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Insulin Glargine 20units once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 48.7 kg; Height 157.6 cm; BMI 19.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 130/88 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.3%; 9 months ago 9.7%; 6 months ago 9.8%; 3 months ago 10.0%; current 10.1%), FPG (12 months ago 208mg/dL; 9 months ago 276mg/dL; 6 months ago 279mg/dL; 3 months ago 272mg/dL; current 289mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 48.9kg; 9 months ago 45.8kg; 6 months ago 47.9kg; 3 months ago 49.9kg; current 48.7kg), Height (12 months ago 157.6cm; 9 months ago 157.6cm; 6 months ago 157.6cm; 3 months ago 157.6cm; current 157.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 19.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 129mmHg; 9 months ago 125mmHg; 6 months ago 124mmHg; 3 months ago 126mmHg; current 130mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 85mmHg; 9 months ago 89mmHg; 6 months ago 88mmHg; 3 months ago 87mmHg; current 88mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 52U/L; 9 months ago 53U/L; 6 months ago 51U/L; 3 months ago 47U/L; current 51U/L), AST (12 months ago 50U/L; 9 months ago 51U/L; 6 months ago 41U/L; 3 months ago 49U/L; current 47U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 73mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 75mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 72mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 71mL/min/1.73m²; current 73mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 65mg/g; 9 months ago 88mg/g; 6 months ago 91mg/g; 3 months ago 87mg/g; current 70mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 77mg/dL; 9 months ago 75mg/dL; 6 months ago 76mg/dL; 3 months ago 71mg/dL; current 73mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 53mg/dL; 9 months ago 52mg/dL; 6 months ago 49mg/dL; 3 months ago 50mg/dL; current 51mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 133mg/dL; 9 months ago 129mg/dL; 6 months ago 117mg/dL; 3 months ago 115mg/dL; current 122mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.8g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 11.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.67 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
